word: G1337 - διθάλασσος - dithálassos - dee-thal'-as-sos - Where two seas meet

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Where two seas meet
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
resembling (or forming) two seas, lying between two seas
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1364 and G2281; having two seas, that is, a sound with a double outlet: - where two seas met.
